GGUF quantizations of https://huggingface.co/lodestones/Chroma

**Update (July 10, 2025)**: Requantized and re-uploaded v42 because Chroma's author re-uploaded new weights for this version.

**Note**: Q3 and below quants degrade in quality so badly that I skipped creating them.

**Note 2**: About Chroma1-HD, you can read it [here](https://huggingface.co/lodestones/Chroma/discussions/99#6895eb8955603aaa61da9cc4)

## Quality test (v41)

Sampler name: Euler

Scheduler: beta

Steps: 30
